title: Masters Weaponry
summary: You are a master user of a particular type of weapon, be it a sword, whip, dagger, gun, or something else.
tiers: Tier 3: Rapid Attack or Disarming Strike
gm_intrusions: Weapons break. Weapons can be stolen. Weapons can be dropped or forced out of your hand.
text: You are a master user of a particular type of weapon, be it a sword, whip, dagger, gun, or something else. (Someone who Masters Weaponry might have additional equipment, including a high- quality weapon.)
details: You are a master user of a particular type of weapon, be it a sword, whip, dagger, gun, or something else.
(Someone who Masters Weaponry might have additional equipment, including a high- quality weapon.)
